Interface EmbeddedSurface

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, NonThrowingAutoCloseable, RenderingSurface
public non-sealed interface EmbeddedSurface extends RenderingSurface
An embedded surface (e.g. UI element). In general, more stationary than WindowSurface.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface RenderingSurface

    RenderingSurface.Feature, RenderingSurface.ResizeListener

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface RenderingSurface

    FB_ORIGINAL_SIZE

    Acquires the next available framebuffer for rendering, if any.

    Returns supported features of this surface.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the name of this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.NAMEABLE is supported.

    Sets the name for this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.NAMEABLE is supported.
    void
    setSize(int newWidth, int newHeight)
    Sets the new size for this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.RESIZABLE is supported.

    Methods inherited from interface RenderingSurface

    close, createPixelReader, getHeight, getPos, getSize, getWidth, getX, getY, hide, isExplicitShouldClose, isFullscreen, isHidden, isResizable, isTranslucent, onResize, pollEvents, present, setFullscreen, setPos, setResizable, setShouldClose, shouldClose, show

  • Method Details

    • getFeatures

      default Set<RenderingSurface.Feature> getFeatures()
      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Returns supported features of this surface. This can be used to check whether some method will throw UnsupportedOperationException.
      Specified by:
      getFeatures in interface RenderingSurface
      Returns:
      supported features of this surface

    • setSize

      void setSize(int newWidth, int newHeight)
      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Sets the new size for this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.RESIZABLE is supported.
      Specified by:
      setSize in interface RenderingSurface
      Parameters:
      newWidth - the new width
      newHeight - the new height
      See Also:
      • RenderingSurface.getFeatures()

      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Returns the name of this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.NAMEABLE is supported.
      Specified by:
      getName in interface RenderingSurface
      Returns:
      the name of this surface, if supported

    • setName

      void setName(String name)
      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Sets the name for this surface, if RenderingSurface.Feature.NAMEABLE is supported.
      Specified by:
      setName in interface RenderingSurface
      Parameters:
      name - the new name

    • acquireBuffer

      default OffscreenFramebuffer acquireBuffer(int prefWidth, int prefHeight)
      Acquires the next available framebuffer for rendering, if any.

      This method is for internal use only; see this note for details.

      Embedded surfaces typically cannot directly use GPU-accelerated rendering APIs due to hosting environment restrictions (e.g., Swing, JavaFX). Instead, they render into an off-screen buffer using software or indirect GPU rendering, which is then copied to the display surface.

      Specified by:
      acquireBuffer in interface RenderingSurface
      Parameters:
      prefWidth - preferred framebuffer width or RenderingSurface.FB_ORIGINAL_SIZE
      prefHeight - preferred framebuffer height or RenderingSurface.FB_ORIGINAL_SIZE
      Returns:
      an available render target or null if not available
